author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered: saved_tensors_hooks module with:
1. Thread-local pack/unpack hooks (f32 and f64)
2. saved_tensors_hooks(pack, unpack, closure) — RAII scoped context manager
3. pack_saved_tensor() / unpack_saved_tensor() — called by GradFn save/load
4. has_saved_tensor_hooks() query
5. Nestable (inner scopes override outer)
6. 3 tests: identity, transform roundtrip, scope cleanup
7. 810 core tests pass
